Frontend: HTML, CSS, React, Tailwind CSS
Backend: Spring Boot, Node.js, REST APIs
Databases: MongoDB, MySQL
Data Science & Machine Learning: NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-Learn, PyTorch
Tools: Git, GitHub, VS Code, Postman, Heroku
Core Subjects: OOP, Data Structures, Operating Systems, Computer Networks
Projects
Care Vision – Healthcare Web Application 2025
• Developed healthcare web application using React, Tailwind CSS and Vite.
• Built responsive UI components for better user experience.
• Designed mobile-friendly interface for healthcare information.
Cropify – AI Powered Smart Farming Assistant
• Built AI system for crop recommendation, fertilizer suggestion and disease detection.
• Implemented ML models using Scikit-Learn and PyTorch ResNet.
• Processed agricultural datasets using NumPy and Pandas.
Experience
Software Development Engineer Intern – Bluestock Fintech Jul 2025 – Aug 2025
• Assisted in developing and testing fintech software modules.
• Participated in debugging and improving system performance.
• Worked with Git-based collaborative development workflows.
Full Stack Development Trainee – Tap Academy
• Completed training in Java, Data Structures and Full Stack Development.
• Built web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript and React.
• Practiced coding challenges and real-world development tasks.
Achievements
• Completed Software Development Engineer Internship with real-world fintech development experience.
• Developed real-world projects including Care Vision and Cropify.
Education
B.E. Computer Science Engineering 2022 – 2026
Maratha Mandal Engineering College, Belagavi
CGPA: 7.8
Higher Secondary Education (12th Grade) 2020 – 2022
J A PU College Athani
Machine learning is a branch of artificial intelligence that enables computers to learn from data without being explicitly programmed.
Python is the most popular programming language for data science and machine learning applications.
Neural networks are computing systems inspired by biological neural networks in the human brain.
Deep learning is a subset of machine learning that uses multiple layers of neural networks to analyze data.
Natural Language Processing (NLP) is a field of AI that helps computers understand and process human language.
TensorFlow and PyTorch are the two most popular deep learning frameworks used by researchers and developers.
Supervised learning uses labeled data to train models, while unsupervised learning finds patterns in unlabeled data.
Transfer learning allows a model trained on one task to be reused for a different but related task.
Computer vision is an AI field that enables computers to interpret and understand visual information from images and videos.
Reinforcement learning is a type of machine learning where an agent learns to make decisions by receiving rewards or penalties.
Data preprocessing involves cleaning, transforming, and organizing raw data before using it for machine learning.
GPT and BERT are popular transformer-based models used for natural language understanding and generation.
Rohit Shivaji Mane
